name: IOpenIDConnectToken
summary: This class represents an OpenIDConnect token issued from an OpenID provider. The token is immutable.

properties.name: AdminGroups
properties.summary: Returns all the groups the user is an admin of.

properties.name: AllGroups
properties.summary: Returns all the groups the user is a member of.

properties.name: AtHash
properties.summary: Access Token hash value. Its value is the base64url encoding of the left-most half of the hash of the octets of the ASCII representation of the access_token value, where the hash algorithm used is the hash algorithm used in the alg Header Parameter of the ID Token's JOSE Header. For instance, if the alg is RS256, hash the access_token value with SHA-256, then take the left-most 128 bits and base64url encode them. The at_hash value is a case sensitive string.

properties.name: Aud
properties.summary: The id of the client (the audience) this token is intended for.

properties.name: AuthTime
properties.summary: Time when the End-User authentication occurred

properties.name: Emails
properties.summary: All the emails belonging to the account the token represents.

properties.name: EmailVerified
properties.summary: true if all the emails in the account have been verified; false otherwise.

properties.name: Exp
properties.summary: The date the token expires.

properties.name: Iat
properties.summary: The date the token was issued.

properties.name: IsExpired
properties.summary: true if the token is expired; false otherwise.

properties.name: Iss
properties.summary: The id of the entity that issued the token.

properties.name: IsUpdated
properties.summary: true if the token has been updated; false otherwise.

properties.name: Locale
properties.summary: The local of the user this token represents. ISO 639-1 Alpha-2 [ISO639‑1] language code and an ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 [ISO3166‑1] country code in, separated by a dash.

properties.name: MemberGroups
properties.summary: Returns all the groups the user is a member of, but not an admin or an owner.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the user this token represents.

properties.name: Nonce
properties.summary: String value used to associate a Client session with an ID Token, and to mitigate replay attacks

properties.name: OwnerGroups
properties.summary: Returns all the groups the user is an owner of.

properties.name: Phone
properties.summary: The phone of the user this token represents.

properties.name: Picture
properties.summary: The url of a picture/avatar/icon of the user this token represents.

properties.name: RawToken
properties.summary: The raw OpenIDConnect token.

properties.name: Sub
properties.summary: The unique id for the subject this token represents.

properties.name: UpdatedAt
properties.summary: The last time the token was updated.
